use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes in web applications
Switch color schemes for user preference or accessibility
Control UI appearance mode in dashboard interfaces
Enable dark mode for reduced eye strain in low-light environments
ai_summary: A theme toggle button component using Radix UI Slot and CVA for variant styling. This atomic component provides a clean, accessible way to switch between light and dark modes in web applications. Supports multiple visual variants including ghost, outline, and default styles, with hover states and focus ring accessibility built-in.
